category: handmade solid wood wall decor and functional home accents
style: rustic modern, natural wood grain, geometric (zig-zag, hexagon), minimalist Scandinavian + farmhouse, warm earth tones, pine and walnut finishes, clean laser-cut or hand-assembled joinery, wall-mounted
targetAudience: home decor lovers, housewarming and wedding gift buyers, wine enthusiasts, farmhouse and cabin style fans, rustic interior collectors, Etsy handmade buyers in US/UK/EU

materials.hardware: mounting screws and wall anchors included

brand.name: Ottoidea
brand.skuPatternHint: NW* for pine racks, WBC* for bath caddies, codes embed model

designPromptExtra: Design a product mockup or photography-ready rendering of a physical wall-mounted solid wood decor item. Natural wood grain visible. Clean background (light neutral wall, or lifestyle scene). No text overlay, no graphic-art style, no printable-art composition. Must look like a real handmade wooden product, NOT a print or poster.
descriptionVoice: warm, artisanal, detail-focused, emphasizes handmade craft, wood species, non-toxic finish, mounting ease, care instructions, and giftability. Short punchy bullets, no emoji abuse, confident tone.
mustMention: wood is a living material — minor variations, knots, cracks are natural
care: wipe with damp cloth, no chemicals
shippingNote: Ships from Turkey. Handling 1-3 business days. Tracked international shipping.
